productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Top Black Top
description: Composition Black U-neck sleeveless top made of 60% cotton and 40% modal, electropleated from the bust line down to the broad hem and has a cloth-buttoned back neck Fitting Comfort Wash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergent Do not dry clean Do not tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Flaunt your feminity in style with this black top from united colors of benetton. The electropleats from the bust line to the broad hem and the buttoned back neck together redefine your feminine side with much elan. Pair this with jeans, heeled sandals and long earrings for a chic look. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-5.8', Chest-33"
